ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "market_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market area where the property is located */,
  "har_area" INTEGER /* HAR (Houston Association of Realtors) area identifier */,
  "rental_price" TEXT /* Rental price of the property */,
  "price_per_sf" TEXT /* Price per square foot of the property */,
  "building_sf" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the building */,
  "num_beds" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "num_baths" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "num_stories" INTEGER /* Number of stories in the property */,
  "dom" INTEGER /* Number of days on market (DOM) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., apartment, house, townhouse) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., available, rented, under maintenance) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_market_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_area_id") REFERENCES market_areas ("market_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_har_area FOREIGN KEY ("har_area") REFERENCES har_areas ("har_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_areas" (
  "market_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market area */,
  "market_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the market area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the market area */,
  "median_income" TEXT /* Median income of residents in the market area */,
  "average_rental_price" TEXT /* Average rental price in the market area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "har_areas" (
  "har_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HAR area */,
  "har_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the HAR area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the HAR area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the HAR area */,
  "median_income" TEXT /* Median income of residents in the HAR area */,
  "average_rental_price" TEXT /* Average rental price in the HAR area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("har_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., amenity, structure, utility) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., exterior, interior, floor plan) */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., lease agreement, inspection report) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date of the document (e.g., lease start date, inspection date) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_documents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., property manager, investor, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the property */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
